subject: IBAS GRB Alerts n.1785 to 1791
body:
S.Mereghetti on behalf of the IBAS Localization Team reports:

IBAS Alerts n.1785 - 1791 are not caused by a GRB or an SGR. They were due
to a known source, but the attitude information was incorrect and they
were not filtered by the IBAS alert distribution software
